ops.text: CARD REVISED TO v1.2 (2026-07-21, in place). Two changes: (1) GAP 4 CLOSED — the paired-DeLong card rule is production code as of commit 40460452c19c: cc_steer/instrument.py (InstrumentCard.load reads this card's sidecar; paired_verdict/unpaired_verdict), watcher promotion persists BOTH arms' per-row probs + full DeLong record to <run>/paired_comparison.json before judging, watcher_promotable applies the card rule (actionable regression refuses; within-noise is never a rejection — supersedes the point-AUC fold), sweep score reports carry probs + frame digest, and `cc-steer compare-arms` verdicts any two arms; E27/E28 published numbers are golden test fixtures (E28 reproduced to <=1e-15). (2) §4d E45 addendum + gap 2 refined — the panel-judge defect MOVED from judge to packet: prompt v2 + K=3 majority (E45, ledger b702c6f9) is non-constant with test-retest kappa 0.734, but 10/15 warranted golden rows are unanimous 3-0 STAY_SILENT under every framing (TPR ceiling ~0.33), so J fails its CI gate structurally; binding fix = human blind labels + resized strata, now tooled by the operator's cc-present labeling commit c61b6677. v2 candidate staged unshipped at ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E45-panel-v2/.
